sub_pixel_system.notes: Racing simulation; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Handling
special_mechanics.description: Realistic car setup system affecting handling characteristics. Player can adjust suspension, turboboost, anti-roll bars, and other parameters that directly affect how the vehicle handles during racing.

physics_values.damage_system: wheel and engine damage possible in longer races

special_mechanics.name: Damage Model
special_mechanics.description: Progressive damage system in races longer than 30 laps. Single wheel damage reduces control; two tire damage makes recovery extremely difficult; rear impacts can cause engine damage with no recovery possible.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Racing simulation with qualitative physics documentation. Source provides gameplay mechanics and car behavior descriptions but no precise movement parameter values. Game focuses on vehicle simulation rather than character/platformer physics.
